description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular wooden storage box with a curved, barrel-shaped hinged lid. The box features reinforced wooden slats along the top and sides, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance reminiscent of a treasure chest. The front side is equipped with a prominent metal clasp and lock mechanism for securing the contents. The wood has a polished, slightly glossy finish, with visible grain patterns and a warm brown color. The box sits on a flat base with three vertical wooden supports on each long side, enhancing its structural integrity. There are no visible handles or labeling areas, and the overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage in garages, sheds, or similar urban environments.
description: A polished wooden storage box with a curved, hinged lid and a metal clasp lock, featuring reinforced slats and a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved lid, metal clasp lock, and reinforced wooden slats.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched profile of the lid and the absence of handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted wooden surface and structural supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same arched lid profile and no visible hardware.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, shed, or storage room
